THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARROLL, APRIL WHITE, CURTIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1388 CALIFORNIA STREET, ROOM #415, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,823.20 RENT, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,923.20, STAYED UNTIL MAR-05-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY & LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITION, PLTFS WILL MOVE TO SET ASIDE JUDGMNT & WAIVE BACK RENT, DAMAGES & COSTS.
